source: The Forever Winter shipping game files (build 24045295) — FWAIPawnDefinition boss defs + weapon defs, decoded with CUE4Parse
note: Datamined straight from each boss's AI pawn definition: layered armour HP, the stagger/stun threshold, melee & dash damage, the grab (sync-kill) health threshold and range, mounted weapons, and kill XP. Tactics are curated from those mechanics plus community testing.

codex.note: Every boss drops a container on defeat; drill it (~60 s) for a guaranteed Codex — 62,500 XP and ~32,800 cr, used in max-rank Innards upgrades, the Cognition Cradle, and some quests.

staggerNote: “Stagger” = burst this much damage into it within the window and it's stunned; only player damage counts. This is why a single railgun shot can freeze a boss a whole magazine can't.

bosses.name: Grabber
bosses.blurb: The thing that runs you down and pulls you in half.
bosses.desc: A fast, bipedal-mechanical terror that stalks the map, then closes with leaps and a mauling melee. Its chip damage is trivial — the danger is the grab: get inside arm's reach and it plays a Smash sync-kill that ends the raid on the spot, even at near-full health. Its AI is internally the “Stalker” (the art and codex call it the Grabber), and Toothy borrows its ability set.
bosses.location: Most maps; hunts day and night
weaknesses: Can't open doors or fit tight gaps — break line of sight behind a gate and it's stuck
Its own melee only does 600–900; the grab is the only thing that actually kills you
Can be stunned — a burst of 20,000 in 3 s (a railgun hit) staggers it

bosses.name: Medium Mech
bosses.blurb: The standard walking tank — and the chassis Rat King and Toothy are built on.
bosses.desc: The workhorse bipedal war-mech, fielded by every faction. It grinds you down with a long rifle, dual quad-guns and two miniguns, plus an 8,000-damage ground-pound up close. Its armour is split into zones totalling roughly 451,000 HP.
bosses.weakpoint: Aim the **exposed lower torso** — the waist/belly joint where the upper body pivots over the hips (the datamined `armor_vulnerable` zone, mesh `SM_Spine_jnt__EXO_TorsoPivotBottom`). It takes **full** damage, while the heavy chest & leg plating (200,000 HP) soaks 90%. The cockpit glass isn't it — that panel is just an info display.
weaknesses: Weak spot: the exposed lower-torso / waist joint takes full damage; the plating soaks up to 90%
Its guns are destructible hardpoints — blow off the shoulder quad-guns and arm cannon to defang it
Stagger window: 20,000 in 4 s
Small arms barely scratch the plating — hit the weak spot, or bring anti-tank / railgun class

bosses.name: Rat King
bosses.blurb: A Medium Mech the Scavengers stole and bolted junk onto.
bosses.desc: Mechanically a Medium Mech — same ~451,000 HP layered armour and mech guns (Rat King weapon variants) — but Scav-piloted and noticeably easier to stun (12,000 vs the standard 20,000). It drops its loot container on death, and its parts are a fetch-quest objective.
bosses.weakpoint: Same Medium Mech chassis, so the same weak spot — the exposed lower-torso / waist joint takes full damage while the plating soaks up to 90%.
weaknesses: Easiest mech to stagger — only 12,000 burst in the window
Drops its container (and the codex) on death

bosses.name: Mother Courage
bosses.blurb: She walks you down and pulls you apart — at any health.
bosses.desc: A towering, female-form automaton that stalks the wastes with immobile cyborgs riveted to her frame. Her melee is a five-hit AOE (8k/6k/6k/8k/6k). The nightmare is her grab: a Rip or Chomp sync-kill that triggers regardless of your health — no health pool saves you, only distance.
weaknesses: Slow — you can simply out-walk her
Stagger window: 30,000 in 4 s
Has a scripted anti-boss self-destruct sequence

bosses.name: Blind Mother
bosses.blurb: Mother Courage with her eyes gone — she hunts by sound alone.
bosses.desc: The same devastating kit as Mother Courage — five-hit AOE, an at-any-health Rip/Chomp grab — but she is blind. No vision sensor at all, just a 30 m instant-hearing cylinder. She literally cannot see you.
weaknesses: Blind — crouch-moving emits no noise event, so a silent approach is invisible to her
Sprinting or shooting nearby is what brings the grab

bosses.name: Toothy
bosses.blurb: The one with the digestive sacks. It eats what it grabs.
bosses.desc: A blocky, ground-shaking Euruskan mech that patrols the flat deserts of Ashen Mesa. A cannon railgun and a left-shoulder machine gun, plus an 8,000-damage Stomp AOE. It grabs troops and scavengers into black digestive sacks (a Bag or Smash sync-kill) and expels the skeletons.
bosses.weakpoint: Built on the same Exo mech chassis, so the vulnerable zone is the exposed lower torso (the waist/pivot joint under the chest) — it takes full damage while the plating soaks up to 90%.
weaknesses: Grab only triggers at ≤700 HP — stay healthy and it can't bag you
Stagger window: 30,000 in 4 s
Layered armour — hit the vulnerable zone

bosses.name: Orgamech
bosses.blurb: A fleshy melee mech that dashes in and stabs.
bosses.desc: A humanoid organic-mech. An eight-hit melee combo (3,000 each), an 800-damage dash gap-closer (0.4–10 m, 10 s cooldown), and a Stab sync-kill. The easiest of the big bosses to stagger, at 20,000.
bosses.location: Euruskan maps; obtainable in the Tunnels
weaknesses: Grab only at ≤700 HP — stay above it
Lowest stagger threshold of the melee bosses — 20,000
Dash telegraphs on a 10 s cooldown

bosses.name: Shield Officer
bosses.blurb: Hides, teleports, and shield-stabs you when you least expect it.
bosses.desc: A shield-bearing Euruskan officer that teleports and relocates to hiding spots mid-fight (its behaviour tree literally has “teleport-to” and “find-hiding-location” tasks). Shares the Orga melee kit — eight-hit combo, 800 dash — plus a Shield-Stab sync-kill. The tankiest stagger threshold of the humanoids at 40,000.
weaknesses: Grab only at ≤700 HP
Repositions constantly — expect it to vanish and reappear
High stagger threshold — 40,000 needs a heavy single hit

bosses.name: Opal
bosses.blurb: The one that circles overhead and strafes you.
bosses.desc: An airborne Eurasian gunship-mech that flies scripted maneuver splines — circle, figure-8, zig-zag, dog-leg, leap-over — while strafing with dual rapid-fire gun-hands (16.7 per shot, full-auto). Its “Glide of Doom” dash deals 800 over an 8–20 m lunge. Very nearly impossible to stagger — threshold 99,999.
weaknesses: You will not stun it — 99,999 stagger is effectively immune
Flies predictable maneuver splines — lead its path
Grab (Shoot sync-kill) only at ≤700 HP

bosses.name: MeatMan
bosses.blurb: Closes two hundred metres in a single lunge.
bosses.desc: A Euruskan melee brute running the Orga brain. Eight-hit combo (3,000 each) and a Stab sync-kill — but its signature is the dash: 800 damage over a 0.4–200 m range on a 6 s cooldown. It can cross almost the entire arena in one charge.
weaknesses: The 200 m dash is on a 6 s cooldown and commits — sidestep the tell
Grab only at ≤700 HP
Stagger window: 20,000 in 4 s
